rationale: Acting on Review 1 removes two trivial rfl wrappers (lines 57/62) that restate sqrtTower's def; this is a minor stylistic preference with no impact on reuse/duplication or correctness (code already rewrites via the def and Mathlib lemmas like adjoin_le_iff). Review 2 correctly approves as no material reuse issues exist in the diff. Resulting PRs are equally good.
